summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing for Vitamin F3 Community Fitness Portal. All major UI/UX features tested successfully including dark theme implementation, responsive design, authentication pages, and navigation functionality.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with premium dark theme and gold accents (#D4AF37)
Navigation shows Sign In/Sign Up when not logged in
Sign-in page renders correctly with centered card layout
Sign-up page renders correctly with form validation hints
Admin page redirects to sign-in when not authenticated
Feature cards display correctly on homepage (6 cards found)
Responsive design works on mobile viewport (390x844)
CSS variables properly configured for dark theme
Gold accent colors properly applied throughout UI
All form elements are interactive and functional
Direct navigation works correctly for all routes
TypeScript compilation successful with no errors
Mobile navigation wraps properly with overflow scroll
Auth card responsive on mobile devices
All data-testid attributes present for testing automation
